Bash(python3.9 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('gymrace.db'\)
print\('=== Amsterdam 480375 segments ==='\)
for r in conn.execute\(\\"SELECT order_num, name, remark FROM details WHERE race_id='amsterdam-2026' AND id='480375' AND order_num >= 1 ORDER BY order_num\\"\):
    print\(r\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Utrecht 420884 segments ==='\)
for r in conn.execute\(\\"SELECT order_num, name, remark FROM details WHERE race_id='utrecht-2025' AND id='420884' AND order_num >= 1 ORDER BY order_num\\"\):
    print\(r\)
")

Bash(python3.9 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('gymrace.db'\)
print\('=== Utrecht 420884 negative order rows ==='\)
for r in conn.execute\(\\"SELECT order_num, name, remark, status FROM details WHERE race_id='utrecht-2025' AND id='420884' AND order_num < 0 ORDER BY order_num\\"\):
    print\(r\)
")

Bash(python3.9 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('gymrace.db'\)
print\('=== Utrecht negative order_num rows \(sample\) ==='\)
for r in conn.execute\(\\"SELECT id, order_num, name, remark FROM details WHERE race_id='utrecht-2025' AND order_num < 0 LIMIT 10\\"\):
    print\(r\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Min order_num in Utrecht ==='\)
for r in conn.execute\(\\"SELECT MIN\(order_num\) FROM details WHERE race_id='utrecht-2025'\\"\):
    print\(r\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Amsterdam sample negative rows for comparison ==='\)
for r in conn.execute\(\\"SELECT id, order_num, name, remark FROM details WHERE race_id='amsterdam-2026' AND order_num < 0 LIMIT 6\\"\):
    print\(r\)
")
